a good reason is a reason that rests on things that are true and can be seen by everyone. It is a reason that stays the same even if you look at it from many sides. If you say you want to eat because your body tells you that you need food to live, that is a good reason. Everyone knows what that feeling is. It is a thing that is true for almost everyone. a good reason is like a house built on hard ground. It does not move when the wind blows.

a bad reason is a reason that is not strong. It might be a reason that only works for one person or a reason that changes very fast. If you say you want to eat because you like the color of the plate, that is a bad reason. The color of the plate does not change the need for food.
